title: yarah #3384
definition:
1) to throw, shoot, cast, pour
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to throw, cast
        1a2) to cast, lay, set
        1a3) to shoot arrows
        1a4) to throw water, rain
    1b) (Niphal) to be shot
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to throw, cast
        1c2) to shoot
        1c3) to point out, show
        1c4) to direct, teach, instruct
        1c5) to throw water, rain

    NASB:  to throw, shoot
